title: Nvidia rival Etched doubles its value to $10.3B in seven months
summary: Etched builds chips that do one thing, inference, and claims to do it far better. Etched built a shared memory pool that spans a whole cluster of chips, stitched together by a proprietary high-speed interconnect.
caption: output/2026-07-23/nvidia-rival-etched-doubles-its-value-to-10-3b-in-seven-months.txt
